id.description: Environment id, or organizationId copied into id for organization-scoped API keys.

organization_id.description: Mapped from the raw API's organizationId field.

organization_access.description: Mapped from the raw API's organizationAccess field.

environment_permissions.description: Mapped from the raw API's environmentPermissions field.

app_setup_completed.description: Mapped from the raw API's appSetupCompleted field.

website_setup_completed.description: Mapped from the raw API's websiteSetupCompleted field.

created_at.description: Mapped from the raw API's createdAt field.

updated_at.description: Mapped from the raw API's updatedAt field.
